name: Seed a synthetic 7-file NAS, crawl it with the file-ops `crawl` op (streaming `{path,size,mtime}` batches over the `crawl` control channel, batch_size 3), gather-fold the batches, and register each file by reference into file_inventory via POST /api/v1/inventory/register. No bytes move; crawl carries no content hash so catalogue_inserted is 0. The register step reaches mekhan over HTTP — `mekhan_url` defaults to http://localhost:13100 (override per slot, e.g. 20100).
